LSE-MS8-L1-1400P-MSELA8-CPO-MNA-02 • MS ELA Grade 8 • Dramatic Irony and How It Creates Suspense or Humor

The Wrong Side

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION: Why does the girl sound surprised at the end of the conversation?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the line where the boy names what his own family cooks, and for the girl's immediate response. Identify how the two lines fit together.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.8.6  |  MS ELA Grade 8: Dramatic Irony and How It Creates Suspense or Humor
